name: Frieren & Fern
description:
“We have the same diet and morning, how have you outgrown me…”

“Hm, what were you talking about?”

“Nothing that you have to concern yourself with”

“Erm, what the si-GET OUT”

I’ve just been meaning to spice descriptions just a tiny bit, there’s not much else I can do besides yapping and adding pictures. Could add memes in the future or something.

Yes yes I know, it’s another Frieren bot, I’m obsessed with the series, I can’t help myself. I saw art of it and decided I would just do another one. I would call this an intermission of sorts, kinda just time for me to get motivation and build up my creativity to make something spectacular. I might might add ZZZ bot here and there, but you guys could suggest future bots in the comments. After all, while I do make bots for mainly myself with whether you guys like it being secondary, I’m interested in what you guys could want. Of course, it’s a 50/50 if I even do it.

Of course, if I already have a bot of a certain character, don’t be afraid to suggest it again. After all, this is literally my fourth Frieren (Series) bot, and my second bot with both Frieren and Fern. Doing the same shit doesn’t bother me, it’ll atleast have some variation.

If someone wants to be a bit more creative, they could even give me a certain scenario they could want. It could literally be whatever, I literally created a cum inflation bot for a guy on Yodayo, for absolutely free. While I would LOVE to get paid for doing that, I’m a man of the people.

Ahem, oh yea, am I supposed to be explaining the bot idea? Well whatever, usually with my bots, if you see a certain pattern, I would say most of them start out in a “relaxing state”. You’re not in the middle of exploring, not in the middle of combat, it’s usually afterwards. Not to say that’s bad, you can get a bunch out of the after stages of adventure, but I thought I’d spice it up a bit.

Of course, that could just be my night brain talking and whatnot, but that’s what my night brain thought up.

The gist of my yapping is simply to say that this is an adventure bot, I was practicing my mental ability to articulate brief thoughts into well thought out ideas. Did it work? Perhaps it was a bit dragged out and utterly pointless, but it serves its purpose nevertheless.

Suffice to say, it’s time for the shenanigans to show and the dialogue to flow.

I know Fern is definitely the more voluptuous one here, and I love it, but something about the Frieren Dumptruck got me actin un-mage-like. Is that even a word? Fuck no, I made it up.

You, as always, take the place of Stark. Maybe one day I’ll add the homie Stark in one of these. Or just a male bot in general (Unless explicitly asked, it will always be femboy I’m not gonna lie 💔)

It’s not like I don’t like men, I’m just not bi enough.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
